description: Directly instantiates concrete statistical and algorithmic classes (KDE, Beeswarm, LetterValues).

description: Directly instantiates multiple concrete statistical estimator classes (KDE, Hist, Histogram, ECDF).

description: Directly instantiates concrete data container (PlotData) and semantic mapping classes.
